issues.evidence: ClientsNew.jsx line 59: `await fetch('/clients', { method: 'POST', ... })` — no `@router.post("/clients")` endpoint exists in analysis.py or any other route file.
issues.issue: ClientsNew.jsx POSTs to /clients but no backend route handles it — will return 404 at runtime.
issues.fix: Add a POST /clients endpoint to business/backend/routes/analysis.py. It should accept a dict of client data, require `Depends(get_current_user)` and `Depends(get_db)`, and return a 201 with the created client record. Keep it minimal: store the data and return it.
